title: opt_share: unsound optimization (start offset ignored when merging)

features.name: two additions sharing common operand with bit slicing
features.description: Code should include two addition operations that share a common operand, where both results are accessed via bit slicing with a non-zero start offset

features.name: bit slice with non-zero start offset
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation using a non-zero start offset (start > 0) on a wire result
